claimText: Agni-5 is a nuclear-capable surface-to-surface ballistic missile powered by a three-stage solid fuel engine.
evidenceExcerpt: A Nuclear-capable Surface-to-Surface Ballistic Missile (SSBM) and is powered by a three-stage solid fuel engine.

claimText: Agni-5 has a range of over 5,000 km and features Multiple Independently Targetable Reentry Vehicle (MIRV) capability.
evidenceExcerpt: Range: Over 5,000 km... Places India among few nations (US, Russia, China, France) with Multiple Independently Targetable Reentry Vehicle (MIRV)-capable ICBMs.

claimText: The Strategic Forces Command (SFC) is part of India's Nuclear Command Authority and manages the country's tactical and strategic nuclear weapons stockpile.
evidenceExcerpt: SFC forms part of India's Nuclear Command Authority and is responsible for the management and administration of the country's tactical and strategic nuclear weapons stockpile.
examUse: Institution-feature question on SFC's role and parent authority.
distractorHooks: Under direct command of the Army Chief
